title: Stainless Steel Pipe (S.S 304 / S.S 316L, ASME BPE)
description: Hygienic-grade stainless steel piping manufactured to ASME BPE dimensional standards, available in 304 and 316L grades with full material traceability and orbital/manual weld documentation.
applications: Purified water (PW), WFI and utility distribution loops in pharmaceutical, food and cosmetics facilities.

title: Carbon Steel Welded Pipe
description: Welded carbon steel pipe used for non-hygienic utility and process lines where sanitary-grade finishing is not required.
applications: Utility lines, compressed air, general industrial process piping.

title: Sanitary Gate Valve
description: A sanitary gate valve providing full-bore on/off flow control, with a crevice-free design that minimizes bacterial harborage and meets stringent sanitary standards.
applications: Isolation and on/off control in hygienic process lines.

title: Sanitary Angle Valve
description: A sanitary angle valve used to redirect and control flow at a 90-degree junction while maintaining hygienic, crevice-free construction.
applications: Directional flow control in hygienic piping systems.

title: Sanitary Modulating Valve
description: A sanitary modulating valve enabling precise, proportional throttling of flow rather than simple on/off operation, suited to automated process control.
applications: Proportional flow control in automated hygienic process lines.

title: Sanitary Ball Valve
description: A sanitary ball valve offering quick quarter-turn shut-off with a smooth, polished bore designed to prevent product build-up.
applications: Quick shut-off and isolation duties in hygienic process piping.

title: Sanitary Diaphragm Valve
description: A sanitary diaphragm valve using a flexible diaphragm to seal the flow path from the actuating mechanism, avoiding dead legs and enabling thorough CIP/SIP cleaning.
applications: Hygienic shut-off and control where zero dead-leg design is critical, e.g. WFI and buffer lines.

title: Sanitary Butterfly Valve
description: A sanitary butterfly valve with a rotating disc for quick, low-pressure-drop flow control, built with hygienic tri-clamp or welded connections.
applications: Flow control and isolation in low-to-medium pressure hygienic lines.

title: Sanitary Needle Valve
description: A sanitary needle valve providing fine, precise throttling for small sample draw-off points on hygienic process lines.
applications: Aseptic sampling points on process and utility lines.

title: Sanitary Manual Two-Way Globe Valve
description: A manually operated two-way sanitary globe valve controlling fluid flow in both directions, offering durability and consistent performance while maintaining hygienic conditions.
applications: Bidirectional flow control and shut-off in hygienic process systems.

title: Sanitary Gate Non-Return Valve
description: A sanitary non-return (check) valve preventing backflow in hygienic piping while maintaining a smooth, crevice-free flow path.
applications: Backflow prevention on hygienic process and utility lines.

title: Sanitary Magnetic Ball Level Sensor
description: A float-type level sensor using a magnetic ball to trigger switching points, built to sanitary standards for tank level monitoring.
applications: Point-level detection in hygienic storage and process tanks.

title: Sanitary Pressure Level Sensor
description: A hydrostatic pressure-based level sensor that infers liquid level from the pressure exerted by the fluid column, built with sanitary wetted parts.
applications: Continuous tank level measurement in hygienic process vessels.

title: Sanitary Ultrasonic Level Sensor
description: A non-contact ultrasonic level sensor that measures liquid level using reflected sound waves, avoiding direct product contact.
applications: Non-contact continuous level monitoring in hygienic tanks.

title: Sanitary Radar Level Sensor
description: A radar-based level sensor offering accurate, non-contact continuous level measurement unaffected by vapor, foam or temperature variation.
applications: High-accuracy continuous level monitoring in hygienic process tanks.

title: Sanitary Capacitance Level Sensor
description: A capacitance-type level sensor that detects level changes through variations in dielectric capacitance, suited to sanitary tank applications.
applications: Continuous or point-level detection in hygienic storage tanks.

title: Sanitary Load Cell Level Sensor
description: A load-cell-based weighing system that determines tank contents by measuring the weight of the vessel and its contents.
applications: Weight-based level/inventory monitoring for hygienic process and storage tanks.

title: Sanitary Turbine Flowmeter
description: A sanitary turbine flowmeter that measures flow rate via a rotor spinning in proportion to fluid velocity, built with sanitary materials and finishes to prevent contamination.
applications: Flow measurement in food, beverage and pharmaceutical process lines.

title: Sanitary Ultrasonic Flowmeter
description: A non-contact ultrasonic flowmeter measuring flow rate from the transit time or Doppler shift of sound waves through the fluid.
applications: Non-invasive flow measurement in hygienic process piping.

title: Sanitary Mass Flowmeter
description: A Coriolis-type mass flowmeter providing direct, highly accurate mass flow and density measurement independent of fluid properties.
applications: High-accuracy mass flow measurement in pharmaceutical and food dosing lines.

title: Sanitary Electromagnetic Flowmeter
description: An electromagnetic (mag-meter) flowmeter measuring the flow of conductive liquids using Faraday's law of induction, with a smooth, crevice-free bore.
applications: Flow measurement of conductive liquids (water, CIP fluids) in hygienic lines.

title: Sanitary PT100 Temperature Sensor
description: A PT100 resistance temperature detector (RTD) housed in a sanitary sensor body for accurate process temperature monitoring.
applications: Temperature monitoring in hygienic process and CIP/SIP systems.

title: Sanitary Pressure Transmitter
description: A sanitary pressure transmitter with a flush diaphragm to convert process pressure into a standard electronic signal without trapping product.
applications: Process pressure monitoring on hygienic vessels and pipelines.

title: Sanitary Pressure Gauge
description: A sanitary pressure gauge providing local, direct-reading pressure indication with a hygienic, cleanable diaphragm seal.
applications: Local pressure indication on hygienic process lines and vessels.

title: Sanitary Conductivity Sensor
description: A sanitary conductivity sensor measuring a liquid's ability to conduct electricity, built with sanitary materials for food, beverage and pharmaceutical use.
applications: Water quality and CIP rinse-water monitoring in hygienic systems.

title: pH Sensor
description: A sanitary pH sensor for continuous, in-line measurement of process fluid acidity/alkalinity, built for hygienic installation.
applications: In-line pH monitoring in hygienic process and utility systems.

title: Sanitary ORP Sensor
description: A sanitary oxidation-reduction potential (ORP) sensor used to monitor the oxidizing/reducing state of a process fluid, e.g. for disinfection verification.
applications: Sanitization and disinfection monitoring in hygienic water systems.

title: Sanitary Centrifugal Self-Priming Pump
description: A sanitary self-priming centrifugal pump capable of drawing fluid without a fully flooded suction line, built to hygienic design standards.
applications: Transfer of hygienic process fluids where suction lift is required.

title: Sanitary Non-Self Priming Pump
description: A sanitary centrifugal pump requiring a pre-filled (flooded) suction line, designed for continuous hygienic fluid transfer duties.
applications: Continuous transfer of hygienic process fluids with flooded suction.

title: Sanitary Dosing Pump
description: A sanitary metering/dosing pump delivering precise, adjustable small-volume flow rates of process or dosing chemicals.
applications: Precise chemical or additive dosing in hygienic process lines.

title: Sanitary DLX Dosing Pump
description: A DLX-series solenoid or motor-driven sanitary dosing pump offering precise, adjustable metering for hygienic applications.
applications: Precise metering of dosing chemicals in hygienic process systems.

title: Single Stage Pump
description: A single-stage centrifugal pump using one impeller to develop the required head, suited to general industrial transfer duties.
applications: General industrial fluid transfer at moderate head requirements.

title: Multi Stage Pump
description: A multi-stage centrifugal pump using several impellers in series to achieve higher discharge heads than a single-stage design.
applications: Industrial applications requiring high-pressure fluid transfer.

title: Hygienic UV Unit
description: A hygienic ultraviolet (UV) disinfection unit that inactivates micro-organisms in process water using UV-C light, built with sanitary wetted materials and connections.
applications: Chemical-free disinfection of purified water and utility water loops.

title: PVC Housing Filters
description: PVC cartridge filter housings used to hold replaceable filter cartridges for liquid or gas filtration in industrial-grade applications.
applications: Housing for cartridge filtration in utility and process water lines.

title: Sanitary Vent Filter Housing
description: A sanitary housing for tank vent filters, protecting tank headspace air from contamination while allowing pressure equalization.
applications: Sterile air venting on hygienic storage and process tanks.

title: Sanitary Air Cartridge Filter
description: A sanitary cartridge filter element for compressed air or vent gas filtration, removing particulates and micro-organisms.
applications: Sterile air/gas filtration for hygienic process and tank venting systems.

title: Sanitary Stainless Steel Single Tank
description: A single-wall sanitary stainless steel tank for storage or process holding of hygienic liquids, built to ASME BPE / GMP-aligned standards.
applications: Storage and process holding of purified water, WFI, or process fluids.

title: Sanitary Stainless Steel Isolated Tank
description: A thermally insulated sanitary stainless steel tank designed to maintain stored fluid temperature and reduce heat loss/gain.
applications: Temperature-sensitive storage of hygienic process fluids.

title: Sanitary Stainless Steel Double Jacket Tank
description: A double-jacketed sanitary stainless steel tank enabling heating or cooling of the tank contents via a jacketed shell, e.g. with steam, water or glycol.
applications: Temperature-controlled storage/processing of hygienic fluids requiring heating or cooling.

title: Sanitary Drain
description: A hygienic drain fitting designed with self-draining geometry and sanitary finishes to prevent fluid pooling and microbial harborage.
applications: Floor and process drainage in hygienic pharmaceutical, food and cosmetics facilities.
